creator: mcj@bluetonic.org
text:
On Sun, Jul 4, 2010 at 1:24 AM, Sahil Tandon <sahil@freebsd.org> wrote:

> On Sat, 2010-07-03 at 15:25:26 -0500, Carey Jones wrote:
>
> > That switch depended on the old openssh port, which is now part of the
> > base system. My understanding was that you were telling it which
> > flavor of ssh you were using, but I could easily be mistaken. :-)
>
> Your patch does not apply to the latest revision of the port.  osa@
> already committed something that fixes build.  Are you still having
> problems building the latest version of this port?  Please confirm it is
> OK so I can close this PR; thanks.
>

Ah...I submitted on the 19th, and that fix was applied on the 21st.  Please
ignore.


 -c
